name: @insler/service-integration
description: Private cross-package integration suite for the service subsystem: exercises the published surface (the single-entrypoint @insler/service umbrella — the env-aware runtime wrapper and the defineService declaration model) exactly as an external consumer would, against built dist output. service is an in-process policy layer over the rpc core (the transport is an injected parameter), so the suite needs no real infrastructure. Run by the path-filtered Service Integration workflow; never published to npm.
